title: EVA ON CHAIR — Sara holds her hand
prompt: Medium two-shot in @dentist-chair. @Eva reclined on the turquoise pediatric chair, paper bib clipped on, eyes squeezed shut tight, both hands gripping the chair arm, body trembling slightly. @Sara stands LEFT of the chair beside Eva, holding Eva's hand firmly with both of her own, leaning in close so only Eva can hear, calm and steady. Bright soft overhead exam light glows above. Sara (whispered, gentle, steady): "Hey. I'm RIGHT here. You can squeeze as hard as you want." Eva (eyes still shut, shaking): "...don't go." Sara (squeezing back hard): "Not going anywhere. Just open your mouth a tiny bit." Eva (slowly, brave shaky breath): "...okay." Eva opens her mouth a tiny crack.
